title: Compensation; expenses
doc_html:
§1405.  Compensation; expenses

The members of said commission shall serve without compensation for their services, but they shall be entitled to reimbursement for actual expenses incurred in the performance of their duties as authorized by the Commission.  

Acts 1968, No. 232, §5.
